qa.question.card_input.help: Uñstayiri asset ukhamächi ukhaxa: pack ukar uñtasita JSON archivo thaki qillqt'ma (sañäni: assets/cards/welcome.json). Uñstayiri inline ukhamächi ukhaxa: taqpacha Adaptive Card JSON lip'katma.
qa.question.card_input.label: Card mantaña
qa.question.card_source.help: Tarjeta pack manqhana mä JSON archivo toqeta apthapiñati jan ukaxa crudo inline card JSON lip'katañati uk ajllma.
qa.question.card_source.label: Kunjamatsa tarjeta churta munta?
qa.remove.description: Aka componente wakichäwi apsuñäni jan ukax wasitat qalltayañäni.
